hero.title:
Your field logbook
in minutes.
hero.subtitle: You review. You approve. You sign.
hero.body: Invoices show up on WhatsApp, email, PDF, handwritten notes. Collecting them, cross-checking and formatting them into the logbook takes hours, before the real work even starts. Drop everything into Seminai. In a few minutes you have the logbook ready.

hero.ctaSecondary: Running a cooperative? See the Network plan →
hero.demoAnomaly: Anomaly 24 Mar: dose 3.2 kg/ha exceeds label limit (max 2.5 kg/ha). Reduce to 2.5 kg/ha.

problem.title: The field logbook isn't hard. It's slow. And the data always lives in the wrong place.
problem.lead: Client WhatsApp. Supplier email. Paper invoice. Handwritten note. Out-of-date spreadsheet. Collecting it all, cross-checking and formatting it, before you even start the logbook, takes hours. Every time. For every farm.

cards.title: 6 hours lost every week.
cards.body: Just to gather data from different sources and transcribe it into the right format. Hours that don't bill. Hours you could spend on new clients.

cards.title: 34% of farms have at least one anomaly.
cards.body: Off-label dosage, treatment not registered on the variety, harvest interval violated. Invisible errors until the inspection arrives. At that point, the average CAP deduction is €4,200 per farm.

cards.title: 4 regulations to cross-check every time.
cards.body: Product label. National pesticide regulation. Current CAP rules. Region-specific rules. They change every year. Keeping them up to date by hand while producing logbooks is impossible.

problem.bridge: Seminai solves all three. In minutes. Without taking away the professional responsibility that belongs to you.

solution.title: How Seminai produces the field logbook in minutes.
solution.lead: Three steps. The first one you do in thirty seconds. The second one is Seminai. The third comes back to you, because a professional's signature can't be delegated.

steps.label: Upload
steps.heading: Upload the invoices from wherever they live.
steps.body: WhatsApp photos, PDF upload, forwarded emails. Pesticides, seeds, fertilizers. Even messy, even from different sources. Seminai collects them all.

steps.label: Process
steps.heading: The system processes and flags.
steps.body: Extracts the data, cross-checks dosages with labels, verifies compliance against 4 live regulatory layers. Every anomaly is flagged with source and corrective action.

steps.label: Approve
steps.heading: You review, approve, deliver.
steps.body: In a few minutes you have the logbook ready for review. You check, approve or correct. You sign. The professional responsibility stays where it belongs.

doorBefore: Sunday 10:30 PM still at the PC closing the logbook.
Client calling in panic about a CAP inspection.
You turn down the fifth new practice: no capacity.
doorAfter: Saturday in the field. Sunday off.
Monday: new client signed without hesitation.
Wednesday: 30 logbooks reviewed in one morning.
CAP deductions for your clients: zero.

trust.title: What Seminai's checks are based on.
trust.lead: Seminai doesn't invent rules. It applies them from official sources, updated automatically whenever regulations change.
trust.foot: When a rule changes, you get an alert. The next logbook is already compliant. You don't have to track updates yourself.
trust.illustrationAria: Robot approving compliance on a clipboard

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about the digital field logbook.

items.question: What is the field logbook and what is it for?
items.answer: The field logbook is the legally required document where every farm records all phytosanitary treatments: products used, dosages, dates, treated crops. It is required by CAP rules, D.Lgs. 150/2012 and specific regional regulations. In an inspection, missing or irregular logbooks can lead to CAP contribution cuts.

items.question: How long does it take to produce a logbook with Seminai?
items.answer: A few minutes from sending the invoices. Without Seminai, an agronomist typically spends 4–6 hours gathering data from different sources and producing the logbook manually.

items.question: Who approves the logbook produced by Seminai?
items.answer: You: the agronomist or technician in charge. Seminai produces the logbook and flags anomalies with specific corrections. You review, approve and sign. Professional responsibility stays with the professional, where it belongs by law.

items.question: How are regulations verified?
items.answer: Seminai cross-checks every treatment against 4 automatically updated regulatory layers: ministerial product label; D.Lgs. 150/2012 and amendments; current CAP rules for the campaign; official regional bulletin for the farm's region. If a treatment violates any of the 4 layers, it is flagged as an anomaly with the specific regulatory source and recommended corrective action.

items.question: How does invoice OCR work?
items.answer: You send invoice photos on WhatsApp or upload PDFs. The platform automatically extracts: date, supplier, commercial product, active ingredient, quantity purchased, lot number, unit price. Extracted data is cross-checked with farm data to produce the field logbook.

items.question: What happens when regulations change?
items.answer: Seminai automatically updates regulatory databases whenever rules change (CAP, national regulation, regional rules. You receive an alert if a change impacts farms you manage. The next logbook is already compliant without you doing anything.

items.question: Are my farm data secure?
items.answer: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. It is not shared with third parties or used to train AI models. You can export or delete all data at any time. Infrastructure on European servers (Hetzner, Germany).

items.question: Does it work for all Italian regions?
items.answer: Yes. Seminai covers regional regulations for all 20 Italian regions. Regulations are updated automatically whenever changes are published in official regional bulletins.

items.question: Can I integrate Seminai with software I already use?
items.answer: Yes. Seminai offers open, documented APIs for integration with existing management systems, accounting software and cooperative management systems. Contact us for a free technical assessment.

items.question: How does the 14-day free trial work?
items.answer: Access the platform with no credit card. You can load up to 2 trial farms with real data. After 14 days, the account becomes read-only: your data stays accessible, it is not deleted. No automatic charges. No obligation to convert.
